MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_digsym_dscor.LongName: DIGSYM Total Correct Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_tp.LongName: DIGSYM True Positive Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_tn.LongName: DIGSYM True Negative Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_fp.LongName: DIGSYM False Positive Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_fn.LongName: DIGSYM False Negative Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_dscorrt.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for Correct Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_tprt.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for True Positive Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_tnrt.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for True Negative Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_fprt.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for False Positive Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_ds_fnrt.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for False Negative Responses for Matching Trials

cnb_digsym_dsmemcr.LongName: DIGSYM Total Correct Responses for Recall Trials

cnb_digsym_dsmemin.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for Correct Responses for Recall Trials

cnb_digsym_dsmcrrt.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for Correct Responses for Recall Trials

cnb_digsym_dsminrt.LongName: DIGSYM Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses for Recall Trials

cnb_digsym_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Digist Symbol Test

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
